title: Khaitan, JSA act on Weavers acquiring majority stake in Centrum Housing Finance
description: Weaver Services Private Limited has acquired a 75.01% stake majority stake in Centrum Housing Finance Limited from Centrum Capital Limited and certain other shareholders.Khaitan & Co advised Weavers on this stake acquisition, and on entering into binding agreements with Morgan Stanley Private Equity Asia for the acquisition of the remaining 24.99% stake.The core transaction team consisted of Sanjay Khan Nagra (Partner), Srikanth Mantravadi (Counsel), Shubhangi Tewari (Principal Associate), A
